cards.summary: Personal automation and AI-assisted lab built to sharpen system design, workflow orchestration, and backend delivery skills.

projects.name: Laravel + n8n Automation Lab
bullets: Built a personal automation ecosystem that turns experimental workflows into reusable systems for content, data, and business operations.
Designed orchestration flows with n8n and Python microservices for parsing, enrichment, scheduling, and cross-service processing.
Integrated local AI runtime with Ollama and multilingual support through LibreTranslate for private automation workflows.
Containerized the platform with Docker/Compose and maintained CI/CD hygiene with GitHub Actions.

meta.label: Technologies used
meta.value: Laravel, n8n, Python, PostgreSQL, Docker, Docker Compose, NGINX, Ollama (Local AI), LibreTranslate, GitHub Actions, RESTful API

cards.company: Compact showcase of learning and R&D repositories
